{/* Hero */}
🩺 Who We Are

About sehat sehul

sehat sehul is a modern healthcare platform dedicated to bringing professional medical support directly to your doorstep. Our goal is to simplify access to healthcare by connecting patients with qualified nurses, trusted pharmacies, and essential medical services — all through one seamless digital experience.

Find a Nurse → Contact Us
👩‍⚕️
200+Verified Nurses
🏪
50+Medical Shops
📍
15+Districts Covered
⭐
4.8★Average Rating
{/* Mission */}
🎯

Our Mission

To make quality healthcare accessible, affordable, and convenient for every household in Jammu & Kashmir — from major cities to smaller towns and villages.

👁️

Our Vision

A J&K where no patient has to travel far for basic healthcare. Where certified professionals reach you — not the other way around.

💡

Our Approach

We combine technology with human compassion. Every nurse is verified, every shop is trusted, and every interaction is designed to make you feel safe and cared for.

{/* Story */}
📖 Our Story

Why We Built sehat sehul

We understand that healthcare should be timely, reliable, and comfortable. With sehat sehul, users can easily book home nursing services, order medicines from verified pharmacies, and stay informed about their well-being — all within a secure and user-friendly environment.

At sehat sehul, we believe that technology should enhance compassion in healthcare. By combining innovation with human care, we aim to create a trusted space where healthcare becomes more accessible, convenient, and supportive for everyone who needs it.

✅ PNC/INC verified nurses only
✅ Drug-licensed medical shops
✅ Home lab sample collection
✅ Free prescription scanning
✅ Secure & private data handling
✅ 24/7 support across J&K

— sehat sehul · SehatSehul
{/* Values */}
💎 Our Values

What We Stand For
